title: Core Elements of Outpatient Antibiotic Stewardship | Antibiotic Prescribing and Use | CDC
text:

The Core Elements of Outpatient Antibiotic Stewardship provides a framework for antibiotic stewardship for outpatient clinicians and facilities that routinely provide antibiotic treatment. 
Stewardship assessment tools are available for outpatient settings and can be used to identify and monitor outpatient stewardship policies and practices. 
Overview 
In 2016, CDC published The Core Elements of Outpatient Antibiotic Stewardship to improve antibiotic prescribing practices across outpatient settings. It outlines a structure for implementing strategies to modify prescribing practices and align them with evidence-based recommendations for the diagnosis and management of infections.

CDC's framework for outpatient antibiotic stewardship programs.
